name: labs_rooms
query:
SELECT r.room_id,
         r.name,
         r.description,
         r.building_id,
         max(case when (last_metrics.value >= al.warning or last_metrics.value >= al.critical) then 1 else 0 end) as is_alert,
         jsonb_object_agg(coalesce(s.type, 'unknown'), value) as metrics,
         jsonb_object_agg(coalesce(s.type, 'unknown'), s.sensor_id) as sensor_ids,
         jsonb_object_agg(s.type, last_metrics.value >= al.warning) 
            FILTER (WHERE s.type IS NOT null and al.warning is not null) as alerts,
         jsonb_object_agg(s.type, last_metrics.value >= al.warning and last_metrics.value < al.critical)
            FILTER (WHERE s.type IS NOT null and al.warning is not null) as warning_alerts,
         jsonb_object_agg(s.type, last_metrics.value >= al.critical) 
          FILTER (WHERE s.type IS NOT null and al.critical is not null) as critical_alerts, 
         max(case when last_metrics.value >= al.critical then 2
                  when last_metrics.value >= al.warning then 1
                  else 0
              end) as alert_level,
         max(last_metrics.timestamp) as last_metric_date
  FROM labs_sensors s
  INNER JOIN labs_rooms r on s.room_id = r.room_id
  INNER JOIN LATERAL (
      SELECT timestamp, value, sensor_id 
      FROM labs_metrics m
      WHERE s.sensor_id = m.sensor_id
      ORDER BY timestamp DESC
      LIMIT 1
  ) last_metrics ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN labs_alerts al on al.sensor_id = last_metrics.sensor_id
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3,4
